allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; tasks=json.load\(sys.stdin\); running=[t for t in tasks if t.get\(''''status''''\) in \(''''QUEUED'''',''''DISPATCHED'''',''''TRANSCRIBING'''',''''PREPROCESSING''''\)]; print\(f''''运行中: {len\(running\)}, 总任务: {len\(tasks\)}''''\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; s=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''Servers: {len\(s\)} online''''\); [print\(f''''  {x[""server_id""]}: {x[""status""]} RTF={x.get\(""rtf_baseline"",""-""\)}''''\) for x in s]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''Total: {d.get\(total,0\)}, Items: {len\(d.get\(items,[]\)\)}''''\); [print\(f''''  {t[task_id][:12]}  {t[status]:15s}  {t.get\(original_name,?\)}''''\) for t in d.get\(''''items'''',[]\)]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; servers=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f''''{s[""server_id""]:16s} {s[""status""]:10s} host={s[""host""]}:{s[""port""]}  max_con={s[""max_concurrency""]}  rtf={s.get\(""rtf_baseline"",""N/A""\)}''''\) for s in servers]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f''''{c[name]:25s} {c[level]:8s} {c[detail]}''''\) for c in d.get\(''''checks'''',[]\)]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; servers=json.load\(sys.stdin\); online=[s for s in servers if s[''''status'''']==''''ONLINE'''']; print\(f''''Servers: {len\(online\)}/{len\(servers\)} online''''\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)\)")
